content: Catastrophic forgetting mitigation in online meta-learning memory consolidation can be reframed as a curiosity-driven active learning pruning problem, where only surprising, prediction-error triggering knowledge from old tasks is consolidated into long-term agent memory instead of rigid weight regularization. This builds on 2024-2025 SOTA active agent memory findings that leverage intrinsic reward signals to prioritize memorable, high-value experiences.
source_topics: Online meta-learning memory consolidation with catastrophic forgetting mitigation
trigger_topic: Online meta-learning memory consolidation with catastrophic forgetting mitigation
